# American Barber Institute (ABI)

> New York City's dedicated barber school since 1996. NYSED/BPSS-licensed.
> 30+ years, 10,000+ graduates. 500-Hour Master Barber Program prepares
> students for the NY State Master Barber license in about 4 months.

## What is the American Barber Institute (ABI)?

A licensed trade school in New York City that trains barbers. Founded in
1996. Approved by NYSED (BPSS). Two campuses (Manhattan and Bronx). Over
10,000 graduates. ACCES-VR funding, Post-9/11 GI Bill® and VA benefits
accepted. Weekly payment plans available from $150 per week.

## Program

**500-Hour Master Barber Program** — the New York State requirement to
sit for the Master Barber license exam.

- Full-time: ~4 months (17 weeks at 30 hrs/week).
- Weekend: ~6–7 months (27 weeks at 18 hrs/week).
- Three schedules: Morning Mon–Fri 8 AM–2 PM, Afternoon Mon–Fri 2 PM–8 PM,
  Weekend Sat–Sun 9 AM–7 PM.
- New classes start the first Monday of every month.

## Tuition (verbatim)

- Plan A (Morning):   $5,600 — $500 down (incl. $100 registration) + 17 weekly payments of $300.
- Plan B (Afternoon): $4,600 — $500 down (incl. $100 registration) + 16 weekly payments of $250 + final $100.
- Plan C (Weekend):   $4,600 — $550 down (incl. $100 registration) + 27 weekly payments of $150.

## Entrance requirements

- At least 17 years old
- High School Diploma or GED — or pass the Ability-To-Benefit (ATB) entrance exam at ABI
- Social Security card
- Valid photo ID or Driver's License
- Proof of residential address
- $500 down payment

## Skills taught

Classic Tapers, Low/Mid/High Fades, High-Top Fades, Pompadours, Fohawks,
Caesars, Bald Heads, Afros, Flat Tops, Razor Lineups, Classical Haircuts,
Beard Trims, Shape Ups, Blowouts, Mohawks, Shampoos, Shaving Techniques,
Facial Massage, Clipper Over Comb, Scissor Over Comb. Includes full NY
State Board Exam preparation.

## Campuses

### Manhattan
- Address: 48 West 39th Street, New York, NY 10018
- English: (212) 290-2289
- Español: (212) 290-0278
- Latitude/Longitude: 40.7522, -73.9849

### Bronx
- Address: 121 Westchester Square, Bronx, NY 10461
- Phone: (718) 676-0640
- Latitude/Longitude: 40.8401, -73.8421

## Contact

- Email: admission@abi.edu
- Hours: Mon–Sun · 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM
